testsuite.name: tests.AutomationTest

testcase.name: prelink_explore
testcase.system-out: Step: Browsing all navigation bar links... Success: All nav bar links browsed successfully.

testcase.name: GUI_Elements_test
testcase.system-out: Step: Filling out registration form details... Success: Form elements submitted successfully.

testcase.name: Upload_Files_test
testcase.system-out: Step: Uploading sample files... Success: File uploads verified.

testcase.name: TableTest
testcase.system-out: Step: Auditing table data structures... Step: Static Table Validation... Step: Dynamic Table Extraction... Step: Traversing pagination sheets... Success: Web Table checks pass cleanly.

testcase.name: Form
testcase.system-out: Step: Typing paragraphs into form sections... Success: All form text blocks verified.

testcase.name: ShadowDOM
testcase.system-out: Step: ERunning: Shadow DOM Test... Step: Cleaning up dummy test files... Success: Shadow DOM .

testcase.name: Tabs
testcase.system-out: Step: Testing dynamic multi-tab features... Success: Browser tabs handled cleanly.

testcase.name: Dynamic_Button
testcase.system-out: Step: Clicking dynamic button element... Success: Dynamic button interaction complete.

testcase.name: Alertsandpopups
testcase.system-out: Step: Handling alerts, confirms, prompts and child windows... Success: All popup dialogs resolved.

testcase.name: MouseHover
testcase.system-out: Step: Hovering over menu to reveal links... Success: Mouse hover dropdown selection completed.

testcase.name: doubleClick
testcase.system-out: Step: Simulating double click action... Success: Double click event registered.

testcase.name: Draganddrop
testcase.system-out: Step: Dragging element to drop zone... Success: Drag and drop operation finished.

testcase.name: slider
testcase.system-out: Step: Shifting minimum and maximum slider bars... Success: Slider positions adjusted successfully.

testcase.name: scrollingDropdown
testcase.system-out: Step: Locating and picking item from scrollable dropdown... Success: Target item chosen from list.

testcase.name: LaptopLinks
testcase.system-out: Step: Checking store redirection pages (Apple, Dell, Lenovo)... Success: External stores loaded fine.

testcase.name: verifyBrokenLinks
testcase.system-out: Step: Scanning HTTP response codes for dead links... Success: Broken link network sweep finished.

testcase.name: Hidden_Elements_AJAX
testcase.system-out: Step: Toggling hidden elements and loading AJAX content... Success: Hidden elements toggled and AJAX content loaded.

testcase.name: download
testcase.system-out: Step: Triggering file download... Success: File downloaded successfully.

testsuite.system-out: Opening Chrome Browser... Navigating to: https://testautomationpractice.blogspot.com Step: Browsing all navigation bar links... Success: All nav bar links browsed successfully. Step: Filling out registration form details... Success: Form elements submitted successfully. Step: Uploading sample files... Success: File uploads verified. Step: Auditing table data structures... Step: Static Table Validation... Step: Dynamic Table Extraction... Step: Traversing pagination sheets... Success: Web Table checks pass cleanly. Step: Typing paragraphs into form sections... Success: All form text blocks verified. Step: ERunning: Shadow DOM Test... Step: Cleaning up dummy test files... Success: Shadow DOM . Step: Testing dynamic multi-tab features... Success: Browser tabs handled cleanly. Step: Clicking dynamic button element... Success: Dynamic button interaction complete. Step: Handling alerts, confirms, prompts and child windows... Success: All popup dialogs resolved. Step: Hovering over menu to reveal links... Success: Mouse hover dropdown selection completed. Step: Simulating double click action... Success: Double click event registered. Step: Dragging element to drop zone... Success: Drag and drop operation finished. Step: Shifting minimum and maximum slider bars... Success: Slider positions adjusted successfully. Step: Locating and picking item from scrollable dropdown... Success: Target item chosen from list. Step: Checking store redirection pages (Apple, Dell, Lenovo)... Success: External stores loaded fine. Step: Scanning HTTP response codes for dead links... Success: Broken link network sweep finished. Step: Toggling hidden elements and loading AJAX content... Success: Hidden elements toggled and AJAX content loaded. Step: Triggering file download... Success: File downloaded successfully. Closing browser and killing driver session...
